prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the scene into a funny childlike doodle drawing while preserving the same core setup: the child with the blue raincoat, blue rain boots, jellyfish-style umbrella, rainy street, lamp post, red phone booth, brick building, flowers, wet pavement reflections, and tree. Make it look like a quick messy sketch drawn with cheap markers or crayons on off-white paper: wobbly black outlines, scribbled coloring, rough crosshatching, bad perspective, awkward proportions, and intentionally imperfect details. Exaggerate the child's face into a silly cartoon expression with big uneven eyes, buck teeth, blushy cheeks, and tongue sticking out. Add simple cartoon rain marks, a gray scribble cloud, yellow glow strokes around the lamp, and loose puddle/reflection scribbles. Keep the umbrella blue with two cartoon eyes and dangling tentacles, but make all shapes playful and naive rather than realistic. Do not make it polished, realistic, painterly, or clean.
